title: Grilled Croatian Sausage with Peppery Slaw
description: A hearty dinner recipe featuring grilled Croatian sausage paired with a refreshing peppery slaw made from red cabbage.

ingredients.name: Croatian Sausage
ingredients.notes: Grill until browned and cooked through

instructions: Grill the Croatian sausage for 5-7 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
While the sausage is grilling, combine the shredded cabbage, cracked peppercorns, caraway seeds, apple cider vinegar, and olive oil in a bowl.
Season the slaw with salt to taste.
Once the sausage is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced sausage with the peppery slaw on the side.
Optional: grill some slices of red cabbage for added crunch and flavor.
